name: HMS Artemis (P 449)
events: 1954 An unidentified stoker attempted sabotaging the sub by placing a signal grenade inside the engine.
21 Jan 1956 Was in collision with a motor trawler in the Channel off the Isle of Wight while on exercises. Artemis sustained no damage and carried on.

1963 While on loan to Canada, caused major concern when she failed to surface in response to signals during manoeuvres, 700 nm off New York. Canadian planes and ships started a frantic search, but Artemis surfaced safely an hour and a half later.
